name: customer_balance_by_nation
source_query: SELECT c_nationkey AS nation_key, COUNT(*) AS customer_count, ROUND(SUM(c_acctbal), 2) AS total_acctbal, ROUND(AVG(c_acctbal), 2) AS avg_acctbal FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.TPCH_SF1.CUSTOMER GROUP BY c_nationkey ORDER BY total_acctbal DESC
target_query: SELECT c_nationkey AS nation_key, COUNT(*) AS customer_count, ROUND(SUM(c_acctbal), 2) AS total_acctbal, ROUND(AVG(c_acctbal), 2) AS avg_acctbal FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.TPCH_SF1.CUSTOMER GROUP BY c_nationkey ORDER BY total_acctbal DESC

name: orders_by_status_revenue
source_query: SELECT o_orderstatus AS order_status, COUNT(*) AS order_count, ROUND(SUM(o_totalprice), 2) AS total_price, ROUND(AVG(o_totalprice), 2) AS avg_price FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.TPCH_SF1.ORDERS GROUP BY o_orderstatus ORDER BY total_price DESC
target_query: SELECT o_orderstatus AS order_status, COUNT(*) AS order_count, ROUND(SUM(o_totalprice), 2) AS total_price, ROUND(AVG(o_totalprice), 2) AS avg_price FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.TPCH_SF1.ORDERS GROUP BY o_orderstatus ORDER BY total_price DESC
